{{Main|Second Ishiba Cabinet{{!}}Current Japanese cabinet}} {{As of|2025|03|26|post=,}} the makeup of the Cabinet:{{Cite web |title=List of Ministers |url=https://japan.kantei.go.jp/103/meibo/daijin/index_e.html|access-date=11 November 2024|website=Prime Minister's Office of Japan |language=en}} {| class="wikitable" ! Portfolio ! Portrait ! colspan=3 | Minister ! Took office ! Left office ! Note |- | colspan="8" style="background:#ccc;" |'''Cabinet ministers''' |- | [[Prime Minister of Japan|Prime Minister]] |style="text-align:center;"|[[File:Ishiba Shigeru 20241001 (cropped 3).jpg|frameless|100x100px]] !style="color:inherit;background-color: {{party color|Liberal Democratic Party (Japan)}}"| |'''[[Shigeru Ishiba]]''' |R |11 November 2024 |Incumbent | |- |[[Minister for Internal Affairs and Communications]] |style="text-align:center;"|[[File:Seiichirō Murakami, Minister for Internal Affairs and Communications.jpg|frameless|100x100px]] !style="color:inherit;background-color: {{party color|Liberal Democratic Party (Japan)}}"| |'''[[Seiichiro Murakami]]''' |R |11 November 2024 |Incumbent | |- |[[Minister of Justice (Japan)|Minister of Justice]] | style="text-align:center;" |[[File:Suzuki keisuke 01.jpg|frameless|100x100px]] !style="color:inherit;background-color: {{party color|Liberal Democratic Party (Japan)}}"| | '''[[Keisuke Suzuki]]''' | R |11 November 2024 |Incumbent | First cabinet appointment |- |[[Minister for Foreign Affairs (Japan)|Minister for Foreign Affairs]] |style="text-align:center;"|[[File:Takeshi Iwaya 20241003 (cropped).jpg|frameless|103x103px]] ! style="color:inherit;background-color: {{party color|Liberal Democratic Party (Japan)}}" | |'''[[Takeshi Iwaya]]''' |R |11 November 2024 |Incumbent | |- |[[Minister of Finance (Japan)|Minister of Finance]]
[[Financial Services Agency|Minister of State for Financial Services]]
Minister in charge of Overcoming Deflation | style="text-align:center;" |[[File:Katsunobu Katō 20241001 (cropped).jpg|frameless|103x103px]] !style="color:inherit;background-color: {{party color|Liberal Democratic Party (Japan)}}"| |'''[[Katsunobu Katō]]''' |R |11 November 2024 |Incumbent | |- |[[Minister of Education, Culture, Sports, Science and Technology]] |style="text-align:center;"|[[File:Toshiko Abe 20200604 (cropped).jpg|frameless|104x104px]] !style="color:inherit;background-color: {{party color|Liberal Democratic Party (Japan)}}"| |'''[[Toshiko Abe]]''' |R |11 November 2024 |Incumbent | |- |[[Minister of Health, Labour and Welfare]] |style="text-align:center;"|[[File:Takamaro Fukuoka (cropped).jpg|frameless|98x98px]] ! style="color:inherit;background-color: {{party color|Liberal Democratic Party (Japan)}}" | |'''[[Takamaro Fukuoka]]''' |C |11 November 2024 |Incumbent | |- |[[Minister of Agriculture, Forestry and Fisheries (Japan)|Minister of Agriculture, Forestry and Fisheries]] |style="text-align:center;"|[[File:Taku_Etō_(2019).jpg|frameless|103x103px]] !style="color:inherit;background-color: {{party color|Liberal Democratic Party (Japan)}}"| |'''[[Taku Etō]]''' |R |11 November 2024 |Incumbent | |- |[[Minister of Economy, Trade and Industry]]
Minister of State for the Nuclear Damage Compensation and Decommissioning Facilitation Corporation |style="text-align:center;"|[[File:Minister of Economy, Trade and Industry Yōji Mutō.jpg|frameless|97x97px]] !style="color:inherit;background-color: {{party color|Liberal Democratic Party (Japan)}}"| |'''[[Yoji Muto]]''' |R |11 November 2024 |Incumbent | |- |[[Minister of Land, Infrastructure, Transport and Tourism]]
Minister in charge of Water Cycle Policy
Minister for the World Horticultural Exhibition [[Yokohama]] [[2027]] |style="text-align:center;"|[[File:Hiromasa Nakano 20241206.jpg|frameless|103x103px]] !style="color:inherit;background-color: {{party color|Komeito}}"| |'''[[Hiromasa Nakano]]''' |R |11 November 2024 |Incumbent |First cabinet appointment |- |[[Minister of the Environment (Japan)|Minister of the Environment]]
Minister of State for Nuclear Emergency Preparedness |style="text-align:center;"|[[File:Keiichiro Asao 20230224 (cropped).jpg|frameless|100x100px]] ! style="color:inherit;background-color: {{party color|Liberal Democratic Party (Japan)}}" | |'''[[Keiichiro Asao]]''' |C |11 November 2024 |Incumbent | |- |[[Minister of Defense (Japan)|Minister of Defense]] |style="text-align:center;"|[[File:Gen Nakatani 20241003.jpg|frameless|99x99px]] !style="color:inherit;background-color: {{party color|Liberal Democratic Party (Japan)}}"| |'''[[Gen Nakatani]]''' |R |11 November 2024 |Incumbent | |- |[[Chief Cabinet Secretary]] |style="text-align:center;"|[[File:Yoshimasa Hayashi 20231222.jpg|frameless|97x97px]] ! style="color:inherit;background-color: {{party color|Liberal Democratic Party (Japan)}}" | |'''[[Yoshimasa Hayashi]]''' |R |11 November 2024 |Incumbent | |- |[[Minister for Digital Transformation]]
Minister in charge of Digital Administrative and Fiscal Reforms
Minister in charge of Digital Garden City Nation Vision
Minister in charge of Administrative Reform
Minister in charge of Civil Service Reform
Minister of State for Regulatory Reform | style="text-align:center;" |[[File:Masaaki Taira 20241001.jpg|frameless|110x110px]] ! style="color:inherit;background-color: {{party color|Liberal Democratic Party (Japan)}}" | | '''[[Masaaki Taira]]''' | R | 11 November 2024 | Incumbent | |- |[[Reconstruction Agency|Minister of Reconstruction]]
Minister in charge of Comprehensive Policy Coordination for Revival from the [[Fukushima nuclear disaster|Nuclear Accident at Fukushima]] |style="text-align:center;" |[[File:98 itou tadahiko.jpg|frameless|105x105px]] ! style="color:inherit;background-color: {{party color|Liberal Democratic Party (Japan)}}"| |'''[[Tadahiko Ito]]''' |R |11 November 2024 |Incumbent | |- |Chairman of the [[National Public Safety Commission (Japan)|National Public Safety Commission]]
Minister in charge of Building National Resilience
Minister in charge of Territorial Issues
Minister of State for Disaster Management and Ocean Policy |style="text-align:center;"|[[File:Manabu Sakai, Minister of State for Special Missions (cropped).jpg|frameless|101x101px]] !style="color:inherit;background-color: {{party color|Liberal Democratic Party (Japan)}}"| |'''[[Manabu Sakai]]''' |R |11 November 2024 |Incumbent | |- |Minister of State for Policies Related to Children
Minister of State for Measures for Declining Birthrate
Minister of State for Youth's Empowerment
Minister of State for Gender Equality
Minister in charge of Women's Empowerment
Minister in charge of Cohesive Society
Minister in charge of Measures for Loneliness and Isolation |style="text-align:center;"|[[File:Junko Mihara, Minister of State for Special Missions.jpg|frameless|115x115px]] ! style="color:inherit;background-color: {{party color|Liberal Democratic Party (Japan)}}" | |'''[[Junko Mihara]]''' |C |11 November 2024 |Incumbent | |- |Minister in charge of Economic Revitalization
Minister in charge of New Capitalism
Minister in charge of Startups
Minister in charge of Infectious Disease Crisis Management
Minister in charge of Social Security Reform
Minister of State for Economic and Fiscal Policy |style="text-align:center;"|[[File:Ryosei Akazawa 20230528 (with teeth).jpg|frameless|100x100px]] ! style="color:inherit;background-color: {{party color|Liberal Democratic Party (Japan)}}" | |'''[[Ryosei Akazawa]]''' |R |11 November 2024 |Incumbent | |- |Minister in charge of Economic Security
Minister of State for "[[Cool Japan]]" Strategy
Minister of State for Intellectual Property Strategy
Minister of State for Science and Technology Policy
Minister of State for Space Policy
Minister of State for Economic Security |style="text-align:center;"|[[File:Minoru Kiuchi portrait 2020.jpg|frameless|102x102px]] ! style="color:inherit;background-color: {{party color|Liberal Democratic Party (Japan)}}"| |'''[[Minoru Kiuchi]]''' |R |11 November 2024 |Incumbent | |- |Minister of State for [[Okinawa Prefecture|Okinawa]] and [[Kuril Islands dispute|Northern Territories]] Affairs
Minister for Consumer Affairs and Food Safety
Minister of State for Regional Revitalization
Minister of State for [[Ainu people|Ainu]]-Related Policies
Minister for the [[Expo 2025|World Expo 2025]] |style="text-align:center;"|[[File:Yoshitaka Itō, Minister of State for Special Missions.jpg|frameless|102x102px]] !style="color:inherit;background-color: {{party color|Liberal Democratic Party (Japan)}}"| |'''[[Yoshitaka Itō]]''' |R |11 November 2024 |Incumbent | |} [[Category:Japan cabinet navigational boxes|+]]

{{Main|Second Ishiba Cabinet{{!}}Current Japanese cabinet}} {{As of|2025|03|26|post=,}} the makeup of the Cabinet:{{Cite web |title=List of Ministers |url=https://japan.kantei.go.jp/103/meibo/daijin/index_e.html|access-date=11 November 2024|website=Prime Minister's Office of Japan |language=en}} {| class="wikitable" ! Portfolio ! Portrait ! colspan=3 | Minister ! Took office ! Left office ! Note |- | colspan="8" style="background:#ccc;" |'''Cabinet ministers''' |- | [[:en:Prime Minister of Japan|Prime Minister]] |style="text-align:center;"|[[File:Ishiba Shigeru 20241001 (cropped 3).jpg|frameless|100x100px]] !style="color:inherit;background-color: {{party color|Liberal Democratic Party (Japan)}}"| |'''[[:en:Shigeru Ishiba|Shigeru Ishiba]]''' |R |11 November 2024 |Incumbent | |- |[[:en:Minister for Internal Affairs and Communications|Minister for Internal Affairs and Communications]] |style="text-align:center;"|[[File:Seiichirō Murakami, Minister for Internal Affairs and Communications.jpg|frameless|100x100px]] !style="color:inherit;background-color: {{party color|Liberal Democratic Party (Japan)}}"| |'''[[Seiichiro Murakami]]''' |R |11 November 2024 |Incumbent | |- |[[:en:Minister of Justice (Japan)|Minister of Justice]] | style="text-align:center;" |[[File:Suzuki keisuke 01.jpg|frameless|100x100px]] !style="color:inherit;background-color: {{party color|Liberal Democratic Party (Japan)}}"| | '''[[Keisuke Suzuki]]''' | R |11 November 2024 |Incumbent | First cabinet appointment |- |[[:en:Minister for Foreign Affairs (Japan)|Minister for Foreign Affairs]] |style="text-align:center;"|[[File:Takeshi Iwaya 20241003 (cropped).jpg|frameless|103x103px]] ! style="color:inherit;background-color: {{party color|Liberal Democratic Party (Japan)}}" | |'''[[Takeshi Iwaya]]''' |R |11 November 2024 |Incumbent | |- |[[:en:Minister of Finance (Japan)|Minister of Finance]]
[[:en:Financial Services Agency|Minister of State for Financial Services]]
Minister in charge of Overcoming Deflation | style="text-align:center;" |[[File:Katsunobu Katō 20241001 (cropped).jpg|frameless|103x103px]] !style="color:inherit;background-color: {{party color|Liberal Democratic Party (Japan)}}"| |'''[[Katsunobu Katō]]''' |R |11 November 2024 |Incumbent | |- |[[:en:Minister of Education, Culture, Sports, Science and Technology|Minister of Education, Culture, Sports, Science and Technology]] |style="text-align:center;"|[[File:Toshiko Abe 20200604 (cropped).jpg|frameless|104x104px]] !style="color:inherit;background-color: {{party color|Liberal Democratic Party (Japan)}}"| |'''[[Toshiko Abe]]''' |R |11 November 2024 |Incumbent | |- |[[Minister of Health, Labour and Welfare]] |style="text-align:center;"|[[File:Takamaro Fukuoka (cropped).jpg|frameless|98x98px]] ! style="color:inherit;background-color: {{party color|Liberal Democratic Party (Japan)}}" | |'''[[Takamaro Fukuoka]]''' |C |11 November 2024 |Incumbent | |- |[[:en:Minister of Agriculture, Forestry and Fisheries (Japan)|Minister of Agriculture, Forestry and Fisheries]] |style="text-align:center;"|[[File:Taku_Etō_(2019).jpg|frameless|103x103px]] !style="color:inherit;background-color: {{party color|Liberal Democratic Party (Japan)}}"| |'''[[Taku Etō]]''' |R |11 November 2024 |Incumbent | |- |[[:en:Minister of Economy, Trade and Industry|Minister of Economy, Trade and Industry]]
Minister of State for the Nuclear Damage Compensation and Decommissioning Facilitation Corporation |style="text-align:center;"|[[File:Minister of Economy, Trade and Industry Yōji Mutō.jpg|frameless|97x97px]] !style="color:inherit;background-color: {{party color|Liberal Democratic Party (Japan)}}"| |'''[[Yoji Muto]]''' |R |11 November 2024 |Incumbent | |- |[[:en:Minister of Land, Infrastructure, Transport and Tourism|Minister of Land, Infrastructure, Transport and Tourism]]
Minister in charge of Water Cycle Policy
Minister for the World Horticultural Exhibition [[:en:Yokohama|Yokohama]] [[:en:2027|2027]] |style="text-align:center;"|[[File:Hiromasa Nakano 20241206.jpg|frameless|103x103px]] !style="color:inherit;background-color: {{party color|Komeito}}"| |'''[[Hiromasa Nakano]]''' |R |11 November 2024 |Incumbent |First cabinet appointment |- |[[:en:Minister of the Environment (Japan)|Minister of the Environment]]
Minister of State for Nuclear Emergency Preparedness |style="text-align:center;"|[[File:Keiichiro Asao 20230224 (cropped).jpg|frameless|100x100px]] ! style="color:inherit;background-color: {{party color|Liberal Democratic Party (Japan)}}" | |'''[[Keiichiro Asao]]''' |C |11 November 2024 |Incumbent | |- |[[:en:Minister of Defense (Japan)|Minister of Defense]] |style="text-align:center;"|[[File:Gen Nakatani 20241003.jpg|frameless|99x99px]] !style="color:inherit;background-color: {{party color|Liberal Democratic Party (Japan)}}"| |'''[[Gen Nakatani]]''' |R |11 November 2024 |Incumbent | |- |[[:en:Chief Cabinet Secretary|Chief Cabinet Secretary]] |style="text-align:center;"|[[File:Yoshimasa Hayashi 20231222.jpg|frameless|97x97px]] ! style="color:inherit;background-color: {{party color|Liberal Democratic Party (Japan)}}" | |'''[[Yoshimasa Hayashi]]''' |R |11 November 2024 |Incumbent | |- |[[Minister for Digital Transformation]]
Minister in charge of Digital Administrative and Fiscal Reforms
Minister in charge of Digital Garden City Nation Vision
Minister in charge of Administrative Reform
Minister in charge of Civil Service Reform
Minister of State for Regulatory Reform | style="text-align:center;" |[[File:Masaaki Taira 20241001.jpg|frameless|110x110px]] ! style="color:inherit;background-color: {{party color|Liberal Democratic Party (Japan)}}" | | '''[[Masaaki Taira]]''' | R | 11 November 2024 | Incumbent | |- |[[:en:Reconstruction Agency|Minister of Reconstruction]]
Minister in charge of Comprehensive Policy Coordination for Revival from the [[:en:Fukushima nuclear disaster|Nuclear Accident at Fukushima]] |style="text-align:center;" |[[File:98 itou tadahiko.jpg|frameless|105x105px]] ! style="color:inherit;background-color: {{party color|Liberal Democratic Party (Japan)}}"| |'''[[Tadahiko Ito]]''' |R |11 November 2024 |Incumbent | |- |Chairman of the [[:en:National Public Safety Commission (Japan)|National Public Safety Commission]]
Minister in charge of Building National Resilience
Minister in charge of Territorial Issues
Minister of State for Disaster Management and Ocean Policy |style="text-align:center;"|[[File:Manabu Sakai, Minister of State for Special Missions (cropped).jpg|frameless|101x101px]] !style="color:inherit;background-color: {{party color|Liberal Democratic Party (Japan)}}"| |'''[[Manabu Sakai]]''' |R |11 November 2024 |Incumbent | |- |Minister of State for Policies Related to Children
Minister of State for Measures for Declining Birthrate
Minister of State for Youth's Empowerment
Minister of State for Gender Equality
Minister in charge of Women's Empowerment
Minister in charge of Cohesive Society
Minister in charge of Measures for Loneliness and Isolation |style="text-align:center;"|[[File:Junko Mihara, Minister of State for Special Missions.jpg|frameless|115x115px]] ! style="color:inherit;background-color: {{party color|Liberal Democratic Party (Japan)}}" | |'''[[Junko Mihara]]''' |C |11 November 2024 |Incumbent | |- |Minister in charge of Economic Revitalization
Minister in charge of New Capitalism
Minister in charge of Startups
Minister in charge of Infectious Disease Crisis Management
Minister in charge of Social Security Reform
Minister of State for Economic and Fiscal Policy |style="text-align:center;"|[[File:Ryosei Akazawa 20230528 (with teeth).jpg|frameless|100x100px]] ! style="color:inherit;background-color: {{party color|Liberal Democratic Party (Japan)}}" | |'''[[Ryosei Akazawa]]''' |R |11 November 2024 |Incumbent | |- |Minister in charge of Economic Security
Minister of State for "[[:en:Cool Japan|Cool Japan]]" Strategy
Minister of State for Intellectual Property Strategy
Minister of State for Science and Technology Policy
Minister of State for Space Policy
Minister of State for Economic Security |style="text-align:center;"|[[File:Minoru Kiuchi portrait 2020.jpg|frameless|102x102px]] ! style="color:inherit;background-color: {{party color|Liberal Democratic Party (Japan)}}"| |'''[[Minoru Kiuchi]]''' |R |11 November 2024 |Incumbent | |- |Minister of State for [[:en:Okinawa Prefecture|Okinawa]] and [[:en:Kuril Islands dispute|Northern Territories]] Affairs
Minister for Consumer Affairs and Food Safety
Minister of State for Regional Revitalization
Minister of State for [[:en:Ainu people|Ainu]]-Related Policies
Minister for the [[Expo 2025|World Expo 2025]] |style="text-align:center;"|[[File:Yoshitaka Itō, Minister of State for Special Missions.jpg|frameless|102x102px]] !style="color:inherit;background-color: {{party color|Liberal Democratic Party (Japan)}}"| |'''[[Yoshitaka Itō]]''' |R |11 November 2024 |Incumbent | |} [[Category:Templates]]
